headline: The AI Double-Tap That Lit Up Cadence
summary: Forget a slow drift; the company's stock was jolted higher by a pair of major AI announcements in a matter of days.

headline: Keysight Introduces RF Signal Analyzers to Accelerate Wideband Wireless Design and Validation
summary: SANTA ROSA, Calif., June 02, 2026--New analyzers help engineers capture more signal behavior with faster measurements, reducing rework and accelerating wireless design and validation.
